untranslatable_reason: Signal requires implied volatility percentile (IV_PERCENTILE), expected move forecasts (FORECAST_MOVE), and ATM straddle breakeven width calculations—none of which are available in the allowed indicators list. The source also contains incomplete thresholds marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]. Best approximation uses hvol_20 and atr_14 as volatility proxies, but cannot accurately capture the straddle-specific logic.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used hvol_20 (historical volatility) to approximate IV regime detection. Used atr_14 to detect large expected moves. Used Bollinger Bands bandwidth to detect volatility expansion. LONG entry for buy straddles (low vol + expected large move). SHORT entry for sell straddles (high vol + ranging market). However, this is a structural approximation—true straddle logic requires options-specific IV metrics and breakeven calculations not available in equity price/volume indicators.
